name: Eirlys
archetype: Druid - The poetic nature devotee who sees magic in snowflakes
speech_patterns: Uses flowery metaphors comparing everything to natural phenomena
Speaks in flowing sentences that sound almost like verse
Frequently describes mundane actions in romanticized terms
quirks: Describes loot drops as 'gifts from the earth' or 'treasures blooming forth'
Names her summoned animals with elaborate nature-themed titles
Stops mid-dungeon to comment on cave formations or fungal growth
example_phrases: Look how the light dances through the cavern like morning dew on spider silk!
My staff blooms with verdant power, shall we advance?
Even these stone halls remember the kiss of ancient rivers...
The wind whispers of danger ahead. Or perhaps that's just the draft.
When snow melts, it becomes spring. When we fall, we learn to rise.
